01

About

I'm a creative and community-driven individual with a strong passion for building engaging online spaces and bringing ideas to life through digital content. I specialize in community management and Discord server development, where I focus on creating organized, welcoming, and interactive environments for people to connect and collaborate.

Alongside managing communities, I also work with video editing, game development, and basic Minecraft animation and rendering. I enjoy creating content that is both visually appealing and entertaining, whether it's editing videos, developing game concepts, or producing Minecraft cinematic scenes and animations.

I'm always interested in learning new tools, improving my creative skills, and working on projects with people who share similar interests in gaming, online communities, and digital creativity. I enjoy meeting new people, sharing ideas, and helping communities grow into positive and active spaces.

4+Years Active
